Arrhenius plot of ln(D) versus 1/T for LLZO. The extracted activation energy is 0.345 eV with a high regression accuracy of R² = 0.9901, corresponding to a fitting error of ±0.01 eV, reflecting reliable linearity in the Arrhenius behavior.
